outcome_autofill_reasoning: The call was a productive conversation with Monica Quindley, who is planning her daughter's wedding for 150 guests. The agent (Andre) had a thorough discussion about the venue, food vision, and catering needs. Andre invited Monica to a tasting event on May 3rd at $35/person, sent her the details via email and text, and she confirmed receipt. However, Monica did not explicitly book/confirm attendance — she stated she needs to check with her daughter first about availability before committing to any of the tasting dates (May 3, 17, or 31). She said she would text Andre to let him know. No meeting was formally booked/confirmed. The prospect is clearly interested and qualified (150-person wedding, specific food vision, active search for a caterer, working with a wedding planner), but no next step was locked in with a confirmed date.

recording_transcript.summary_html:
• Discussed 150-person wedding for Monica's daughter Julia at a waterside venue with electricity and running water available.
  • Planned cocktail hour appetizers at carriage house and main meal in field tent with free-flow, handheld food options balanced with adequate seating.
  • Invited Monica to tasting on May 3rd at 5:30pm in Fitchburg, Mass at $35 per person with credit toward final invoice if they book.
  • Confirmed Julia showed interest at Kingston wedding expo and Andre will follow up with her directly.
  • Monica will coordinate with Julia and wedding planner to confirm tasting attendance and notify Andre via text.

Event Details and Client Background

  • Monica is helping her daughter Julia plan a wedding for 150 guests.
  • This is Julia's first experience with professional catering services.
  • Monica is taking the lead on catering arrangements to reduce her daughter's stress.
  • Julia showed interest in Comeketo Catering at a wedding expo in Kingston, Mass on the 15th.

Venue and Event Setup

  • The venue is on the water with a large field, owned by a private individual who charges only donations to local charities.
  • The property has hosted approximately 25 weddings and includes a main house and carriage house.
  • Electricity and running water are available at the tent location in the field.
  • Appetizers will be served at the carriage house during cocktail hour, with the main meal in the tent below.
  • Guest parking is limited; most attendees will be shuttled in.
  • The bar service is already arranged through someone Julia knows.

Catering Vision and Menu Preferences

  • Julia wants a free-flowing experience rather than traditional sit-down, plated service.
  • Monica prefers handheld food options but insists guests need adequate seating and table space.
  • Monica is seeking a balance between an engaging experience and proper meal service.
  • Andre envisioned barbecue pits, smoking meats, a buffet line, and gaucho-style carving service.
  • The catering approach should accommodate the venue's water-side field setting.

Tasting and Next Steps

  • Andre invited Monica to a tasting event on May 3rd at 5:30pm at Comeketo Catering's Fitchburg, Mass location.
  • The tasting costs $35 per person, with refunds of up to $70 credited toward the final bill if they book.
  • Additional tasting dates available are May 17th and May 31st, all in Fitchburg, Mass.
  • Monica will coordinate with Julia and their wedding planner to confirm attendance.
  • Monica will notify Andre via text message about the selected tasting date.
  • A menu quote will be provided after the tasting based on items sampled.

Contact Information and Follow-up

  • Andre sent Monica email confirmation and text message details about the tasting.
  • Andre confirmed he found Julia Quindley's contact information from the wedding expo.
  • Andre will follow up with Julia directly and has provided his direct phone number to Monica.
  • Monica or Julia can contact Andre via text, email, or phone to confirm tasting attendance.
recording_transcript.summary_text:
- Discussed 150-person wedding for Monica's daughter Julia at a waterside venue with electricity and running water available.
- Planned cocktail hour appetizers at carriage house and main meal in field tent with free-flow, handheld food options balanced with adequate seating.
- Invited Monica to tasting on May 3rd at 5:30pm in Fitchburg, Mass at $35 per person with credit toward final invoice if they book.
- Confirmed Julia showed interest at Kingston wedding expo and Andre will follow up with her directly.
- Monica will coordinate with Julia and wedding planner to confirm tasting attendance and notify Andre via text.

### Event Details and Client Background
- Monica is helping her daughter Julia plan a wedding for 150 guests.
- This is Julia's first experience with professional catering services.
- Monica is taking the lead on catering arrangements to reduce her daughter's stress.
- Julia showed interest in Comeketo Catering at a wedding expo in Kingston, Mass on the 15th.

### Venue and Event Setup
- **The venue is on the water with a large field, owned by a private individual who charges only donations to local charities.**
- The property has hosted approximately 25 weddings and includes a main house and carriage house.
- **Electricity and running water are available at the tent location in the field.**
- **Appetizers will be served at the carriage house during cocktail hour, with the main meal in the tent below.**
- Guest parking is limited; most attendees will be shuttled in.
- The bar service is already arranged through someone Julia knows.

### Catering Vision and Menu Preferences
- Julia wants a free-flowing experience rather than traditional sit-down, plated service.
- **Monica prefers handheld food options but insists guests need adequate seating and table space.**
- Monica is seeking a balance between an engaging experience and proper meal service.
- Andre envisioned barbecue pits, smoking meats, a buffet line, and gaucho-style carving service.
- The catering approach should accommodate the venue's water-side field setting.

### Tasting and Next Steps
- Andre invited Monica to a tasting event on May 3rd at 5:30pm at Comeketo Catering's Fitchburg, Mass location.
- The tasting costs $35 per person, with refunds of up to $70 credited toward the final bill if they book.
- Additional tasting dates available are May 17th and May 31st, all in Fitchburg, Mass.
- Monica will coordinate with Julia and their wedding planner to confirm attendance.
- Monica will notify Andre via text message about the selected tasting date.
- A menu quote will be provided after the tasting based on items sampled.

### Contact Information and Follow-up
- Andre sent Monica email confirmation and text message details about the tasting.
- Andre confirmed he found Julia Quindley's contact information from the wedding expo.
- Andre will follow up with Julia directly and has provided his direct phone number to Monica.
- Monica or Julia can contact Andre via text, email, or phone to confirm tasting attendance.
